scope: Missing records required to complete Phase 2 ranks 1-26
validation_notes: Honda vehicles use the Maintenance Minder rather than fixed normal-use mileage for most services.
Mopar records use owner-manual maintenance-monitor rules and require engine-specific validation before production.
Subaru records use the recurring US warranty-and-maintenance schedule; severe-use CVT and differential services remain conditional.
Hyundai and Kia intervals vary by engine and severe-use definition. The production dataset should split turbo and non-turbo variants where flagged.
The Mazda CX-5 uses a flexible oil monitor with a maximum interval; turbo spark-plug timing differs from the naturally aspirated engine.
Lower-confidence records are explicitly flagged for Claude rather than silently treated as final.

vehicles.trim: Universal Maintenance Minder schedule; gasoline and hybrid differ
vehicles.source: 2021 Honda CR-V Owner's Manual / Honda Maintenance Minder

interval.logic: Maintenance Minder A; change at least annually if no message appears

maintenance.notes: Oil life percentage determines normal timing.

maintenance.service: Engine oil and filter replacement plus inspections
maintenance.notes: B service also includes front/rear brake inspection and parking-brake adjustment plus steering, suspension, fluid, exhaust, fuel-line, and hose checks.
Perform when sub-item 1 appears.

maintenance.service: Engine air filter, cabin filter, and drive-belt inspection
maintenance.notes: Dusty conditions can require earlier filter service.
Fluid specification and procedure differ between gasoline CVT and hybrid drive unit.
Perform when sub-item 4 appears.
Hybrid cooling systems require variant-specific review.
AWD models only.

interval.logic: Maintenance Minder sub-item 7 or every 3 years if not prompted

maintenance.notes: Time limit applies independently of mileage.

validation_flags: Split gasoline and hybrid records.
Honda does not publish fixed mileage for most normal-use Minder services; do not invent mileage.
Verify whether the 2021 regional manual exposes sub-item 7 in all US configurations.
